name: PAX Large Stash Jar
summary: This airtight Stash Jar is made of high-quality aluminium, ensuring your goods are well-protected from sunlight and stay fresh.
description: This airtight Stash Jar is made of high-quality aluminium, ensuring your goods are well-protected from sunlight and stay fresh. It is perfectly compatible with the PAX Small Stash Jar and PAX Grinder (sold separately), making it a convenient addition to your collection. Capacity : Holds up to 1 oz of dry herb Dimensions : 5.3”L x 2.8”W x 2.6”H / 13.5 x 7.2 x 6.5 cm Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.
